title: S&P 500, Nasdaq power to new highs — Apple +3% on earnings beat
snippet: S&P 500 +0.29% to 7,230.12 (new ATH). Nasdaq +0.89% to 25,114 (new record, first 25K). Dow -0.31% to 49,499. Apple +3% on fiscal Q2 beat. Five9 +30%. Spirit Aviation preparing to cease operations. Oil price decline contributed to afternoon rally.
tag_reason: 5/1 시장 마감 결과(S&P 7,230, Nasdaq 25K 최초 돌파)는 신규
